description: Dodampahalage Primal Gerard Fernando Vs. The Employee\'s Trust Fund Board and Others Dodampahalage Primal Gerard Fernando Vs. The Employee\'s Trust Fund Board and Others View More before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Dodampahalage Primal Gerard Fernando Vs. The Employee\'s Trust Fund Board and Others Dodampahalage Primal Gerard Fernando Vs. The Employee\'s Trust Fund Board and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner was attached to the 1st Respondent company as the general manager; the 4th to 10th Respondents, who are said to be leaders of a certain trade union, led a mob, and barged into the Petitioner’s office chamber and demanded his resignation by threatening by death, subject to wrongful restraint and unlawful confinement. The Police had taken actions based on a complaint, but the 1st to 3rd Respondents never took any disciplinary actions against the 4th to 10th Respondents; therefore, the Petitioner sought the intervention of this Court. Held – Writ of Mandamus issued compelling the 1st to 3rd Respondents to take the necessary disciplinary actions against the 4th to 10th Respondents.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
